# Sell My Car

> A UK car buying service. Sell your car fast and get paid the same day.

## What We Do

- Free instant car valuation — enter your reg plate and see your vehicle details confirmed in seconds
- UK-based car buyers — we buy any make, model, age or condition
- No fees and no haggling — the offer is what you receive
- Free collection from your door anywhere in the UK
- Same day payment on collection

## How It Works

1. Enter your reg plate — we pull your vehicle details from the DVLA instantly
2. Confirm your car and add your mileage and contact details
3. We review your enquiry and call you with an offer — usually within the hour
4. Accept the offer, we collect for free, and you get paid the same day

## Pages

- Homepage: / — Enter your reg plate to get a free valuation
- How It Works: /how-it-works — Full step-by-step guide to selling your car with us
- Sell My Car: /sell-my-car — What cars we buy, condition guide, and what to expect
- FAQ: /faq — Common questions about selling your car
- About: /about — Who we are and why sellers trust us
- Contact: /contact — Get in touch via the enquiry form

## Service Area

United Kingdom

## Useful Tools (coming soon)

- MOT checker
- Car tax checker
- ULEZ checker
- Car value tracker
